brief: Run Run mini game lobby icon. Pixel-art casual Korean retro mood. Include 2 to 4 dot characters inspired by Kim Yeonja, Park Sangmin, Park Wankyu, Seo Taiji. Show zigzag road, left-right switching, speed streaks, playful funny tension, readable at small size.
style: 16-bit pixel art, warm humorous rustic Korean arcade tone, chunky outlines, high contrast, no text, no watermark, icon-friendly centered composition

history.generationPrompt: Create a lobby icon for the 'Run Run' mini game in 16-bit pixel art. Capture a casual Korean retro vibe with 2 to 4 dot-style characters inspired by Kim Yeonja, Park Sangmin, Park Wankyu, and Seo Taiji. Include a zigzag road with left-right switching and speed streaks for playful, funny tension. Ensure the design is readable at small sizes, using warm, humorous rustic Korean arcade tones with chunky outlines, high contrast, and a centered composition without text or watermarks.
history.makerChangeSummary: The prompt has been refined to clearly specify each element required for production: inclusion of specific cultural inspirations, design elements like road and speed effects, the art style guidance, and constraints like size readability and outline style. This ensures clarity and readiness for the image generation task.

strengths: Excellent composition; the large 'Z' shaped path immediately conveys the gameplay mechanic and fits the icon format perfectly.
Color palette captures the 'warm rustic Korean arcade' mood effectively with good contrast.
Characters are readable against the background and convey a sense of movement.
Adheres strictly to the 'no text' and 'centered composition' requirements.
issues: Character likeness is slightly generic; while they fit the retro vibe, specific traits (like Park Wankyu's long hair or Seo Taiji's signature 90s fashion) could be more distinct.
Minor pixel grid inconsistencies (mixels) are present on the diagonal road lines, typical of AI generation.
The road dash markings are somewhat uneven in spacing.
evaluation.revisedPrompt: Create a lobby icon for the 'Run Run' mini game in strict 16-bit pixel art. Center a bold orange zigzag road on a dark background. Place 4 distinct chibi pixel characters running on the road: 1) Man with a beanie and baggy clothes (90s Seo Taiji style), 2) Man with long flowing black hair and sunglasses (Park Wankyu style), 3) Woman in a sparkly trot dress with a microphone (Kim Yeonja style), 4) Man with a fedora and sunglasses (Park Sangmin style). Ensure distinct silhouettes and iconic accessories for each. Warm retro arcade colors, chunky uniform outlines, clean pixel grid, high contrast, no text.
